steps.title: Find b using the point (-25, 0)
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(-25, 0)$, so $f(-25) = a\sqrt{-25+b} = 0$. Since $f(25) \lt 0$ (not zero), we cannot have $a = 0$. Therefore $\sqrt{-25+b} = 0$, which gives us:
$$b = 25$$

steps.title: Find the sign of a using f(25) < 0
steps.content:
With $b = 25$, we get $f(25) = a\sqrt{50}$. Since $\sqrt{50} = 5\sqrt{2}$, we have $f(25) = a \cdot 5\sqrt{2}$. The factor $5\sqrt{2} \gt 0$, but $f(25) \lt 0$, so:
$$a \lt 0$$

steps.title: Compare a and b to determine the answer
steps.content:
We established that $a \lt 0$ and $b = 25$. Therefore:
$$a \lt 0 \lt 25 = b$$
which means $a \lt b$. That matches the correct answer - D is correct.
